static_findings.message: Possible SQL injection: SQL query variable "updateSql" appears to be built unsafely before execution.
static_findings.evidence: String updateSql = "UPDATE tickets SET status='RESOLVED' WHERE id=" + ticketId

static_findings.message: Possible SQL injection: SQL query variable "insertSql" appears to be built unsafely before execution.
static_findings.evidence: String insertSql = "INSERT INTO ticket_notes(ticket_id, author, body) VALUES (" + ticketId + ", '" + actor + "', '" + note + "')"
